user_prompt: Hi have a look at program.md and let's kick off a new experiment! I am going to sleep

proposer.command: claude -p --permission-mode bypassPermissions --allowedTools 'Read Edit Write Bash(git:*) Bash(rg:*) Bash(ls:*) Bash(cat:*)' --append-system-prompt "$(cat proposer_prompt.txt)" "Edit candidate_program.md in the current directory."
